input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  SECRET_1: EIQ8VWbg8LRnX7n6PIP9HjXLg4nIKOsJk0xnMunbMZ475Z+pTd73awLu6VCbjO5DVAd9R7W36snIlGVv92j3dai6e0jOO+WtSTQ7gd1cEq+4swEXg7Qvc1oyqsXVL+FoO+j1InZxxUx93ObLRGvFZiUeBhnPNdqsM794EkUScN4=
  SECRET_2: HLMEzx4NuU+oXU5yGViN8pAfFvhVeib5zvfH21nVbOC1Rg57HUKQTRCg5S/acr5C8At4BfHORt7p3MHztGB/GXylzm1kFRnKliJ50S9BkEW+/852f2gbGmnIEe7aMz4nFOheRpLgk7zcZrbYbztoRAFL+HREBiEaAZu8bti4gpU=
  JAVA_HOME: /home/runner/openjdk11

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle
            ~/.sdkman
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}-sdkman
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.x'
      - name: Install codecov
        run: pip install codecov
      - name: Setup SDKMAN
        run: |
          [[ -d $HOME/.sdkman/ ]] && [[ -d $HOME/.sdkman/bin/ ]] || rm -rf $HOME/.sdkman/
          curl -sL https://get.sdkman.io | bash
          echo sdkman_auto_answer=true > $HOME/.sdkman/etc/config
          echo sdkman_auto_selfupdate=true >> $HOME/.sdkman/etc/config
          source "$HOME/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh"
      - name: Update CA certificates
        run: |
          sudo dpkg --purge --force-depends ca-certificates-java || true
          sudo apt-get update
          sudo apt-get install ca-certificates-java
          sudo update-ca-certificates -f
      - name: Assemble
        run: source ./config_build.sh && ./gradlew assemble -DexcludeBenchmark
      - name: Run tests
        run: source ./config_build.sh && ./run_tests.sh
      - name: Build distributions
        run: ./gradlew buildDistributions -DexcludeBenchmark
      - name: Upload coverage
        run: codecov
      - name: Deploy to Bintray
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/develop'
        run: |
          # TODO: Configure Bintray deployment using bintray.json
        env:
          BINTRAY_USER: jbachorik
          BINTRAY_KEY: I+Lvki1TM2pQPJEf75U098GSQexgjudOZ2TDCPSQEdGys7PdW7SIy5THiHYdCG+tO8dSKQ3FUXufDD1KzhHxEBSWUX1rpAgE3SGvxYwzAU+bl3FvoQzjb+WD69ya86h0TFM2fVOJsg4+iDimheHcD+7mCuYx3ga1dsi8lVjh38s=
      - name: Gitter notification
        if: always()
        run: |
          # TODO: Configure Gitter webhook notifications to https://webhooks.gitter.im/e/31a671345ecfdce18046
output:
env:
  global:
  - secure: EIQ8VWbg8LRnX7n6PIP9HjXLg4nIKOsJk0xnMunbMZ475Z+pTd73awLu6VCbjO5DVAd9R7W36snIlGVv92j3dai6e0jOO+WtSTQ7gd1cEq+4swEXg7Qvc1oyqsXVL+FoO+j1InZxxUx93ObLRGvFZiUeBhnPNdqsM794EkUScN4=
  - secure: HLMEzx4NuU+oXU5yGViN8pAfFvhVeib5zvfH21nVbOC1Rg57HUKQTRCg5S/acr5C8At4BfHORt7p3MHztGB/GXylzm1kFRnKliJ50S9BkEW+/852f2gbGmnIEe7aMz4nFOheRpLgk7zcZrbYbztoRAFL+HREBiEaAZu8bti4gpU=
  - JAVA_HOME=/home/travis/openjdk11
sudo: false
dist: trusty
cache:
  directories:
  - "$HOME/.gradle"
  - $HOME/.sdkman
language: java
jdk:
- openjdk11

notifications:
  webhooks:
    urls: https://webhooks.gitter.im/e/31a671345ecfdce18046
    on_success: change
    on_failure: always
    on_start: never

before_install:
- "[[ -d /home/travis/.sdkman/ ]] && [[ -d /home/travis/.sdkman/bin/ ]] || rm -rf /home/travis/.sdkman/"
- curl -sL https://get.sdkman.io | bash
- echo sdkman_auto_answer=true > $HOME/.sdkman/etc/config
- echo sdkman_auto_selfupdate=true >> $HOME/.sdkman/etc/config
- source "/home/travis/.sdkman/bin/sdkman-init.sh"
- pip install --user codecov
- sudo dpkg --purge --force-depends ca-certificates-java
- sudo apt-get install ca-certificates-java
- sudo update-ca-certificates -f

- "source ./config_build.sh && ./gradlew assemble -DexcludeBenchmark"
script: "source ./config_build.sh && ./run_tests.sh"
after_success:

- codecov

CONVERSION RULES
- Preserve semantics: env (global/matrix), caches, services/addons, branch/tag filters, deploys, notifications.
- Map jobs/steps -> Travis lifecycle; strategy.matrix -> language versions or matrix.include; continue-on-error -> matrix.allow_failures.
- Env: ${{ secrets.FOO }} -> $FOO (assume configured).
- Caches: actions/cache -> cache: directories (e.g., ~/.m2/repository, ~/.gradle/*, $HOME/.npm).
- Services: GHA services -> Travis services/addons; keep docker-compose and wait loops in hooks.
- Triggers: on: branches/tags -> branches: only/except; releases -> deploy.on.tags: true.
- Do NOT introduce tools/registries not in the source. If no 1 to 1 equivalent, add a short "# TODO:".
- Maintain 1 to 1, JDK, Git version numbers, branch names as in source. Do not introduce new names or brances or numbers.
- DO NOT repeat to sequence JDK or git version numbers, use as given in the Github Actions and stick to it.
- DO NOT repeat sections, like deploy, script, before_install, install, matrix etc. MUST NOT be duplicated.

Now migrate below input section Github Actions workflow to equivalent complete Travis CI configuration and return ONLY the complete .travis.yml maintaining the above OUTPUT and CONVERSION rules.
input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    strategy:
      matrix:
        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest]
    runs-on: ${{ matrix.os }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.gradle/caches
            ~/.gradle/wrapper
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Update Homebrew
        if: runner.os == 'macOS'
        run: brew update
      - name: Assemble
        run: ./gradlew assemble --warning-mode all
      - name: Check
        run: ./gradlew check --warning-mode all
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: |
          rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
          rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/
output:
language: java

jdk:
  - openjdk11

os:
  - linux
  - osx

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock
  - rm -fr $HOME/.gradle/caches/*/plugin-resolution/

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

before_install:
  - if [[ "$TRAVIS_OS_NAME" == "osx" ]]; then brew update; fi

install: true

script:
  - ./gradlew assemble --warning-mode all
  - ./gradlew check --warning-mode all

input:
name: CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 8
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Setup Android SDK
        uses: android-actions/setup-android@v3
      - name: Install Android SDK components
        run: |
          sdkmanager "platform-tools" "tools"
          sdkmanager "platforms;android-28"
          sdkmanager "build-tools;28.0.3"
          sdkmanager "extras;android;m2repository"
      - name: Cache Gradle packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.gradle
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-
      - name: Make gradlew executable
        run: chmod +x gradlew
      - name: Build with Gradle
        run: ./gradlew build
      - name: Cleanup Gradle Cache
        run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/
output:
language: android

android:
  components:
    - platform-tools
    - tools
    - android-28
    - build-tools-28.0.3
    - extra-android-m2repository

before_script:
  - chmod +x gradlew
    
script:
  - "./gradlew build"

jdk:
  - oraclejdk8

notifications:
  email: false

sudo: false

before_cache:
  - rm -f $HOME/.gradle/
cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle

name: Java CI

on:
  push:
    branches: [ master ]
    tags: [ "*" ]
  pull_request:
    branches: [ master ]

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4

    - name: Install
      run: |
        mvn clean deploy -Pbuild-deploy -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V -Dtoken=$DEPLOY_KEY
        mvn clean install -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V
        ant dist

    - name: Create Release
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
      id: create_release
      uses: actions/create-release@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        tag_name: ${{ github.ref }}
        release_name: ${{ github.ref }}
        draft: false
        prerelease: false

    - name: Upload Release Asset
      if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
      uses: actions/upload-release-asset@v1
      env:
        GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      with:
        upload_url: ${{ steps.create_release.outputs.upload_url }}
        asset_path: MedTagger.zip
        asset_name: MedTagger.zip
        asset_content_type: application/zip

install:

  - mvn clean install -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.javadoc.skip=true -B -V
  - ant dist
deploy:
  provider: releases
  overwrite: true
  api_key:
    secure: 
  file: MedTagger.zip
  on:
    tags: true
  skip_cleanup: true

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - master
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - master

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-20.04
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK 11
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '11'
          architecture: 'aarch64'
      - name: Install dependencies
        run: |
          export PROJECT_DIR=$PWD
          sudo apt-get update -qq
          sudo apt-get install -qq --yes tree git build-essential file curl wget maven gcc

          cd $PROJECT_DIR

          mvn clean install -Drelease-build

on: [push, pull_request]

env:
  GIT_NAME: Spencer Gibb
  GIT_EMAIL: sgibb@pivotal.io
  CI_DEPLOY_USERNAME: sgibb
  CI_DEPLOY_PASSWORD: cbst4/p78WIcjFgGV5YJ4x8vTpaMrrDMiVuHi3iprf4vE3KNktod9NW0/C6AB77ik6ndAYHI/qwUpb401DPPGvKf6rMwKtsVelwQu0TPqIhb3aHtOGwYdwQ5sCASkJZv2XvVc1sjjYLL7cXGRn85q1WN8B8JywKU6u9jgt2612o=

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      - name: Set up JDK
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: temurin
          java-version: '8'
      - name: Cache Maven packages
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: ~/.m2
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-m2-${{ hashFiles('**/pom.xml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-m2-
      - name: Configure Git
        run: |
          git config user.name "$GIT_NAME"
          git config user.email "$GIT_EMAIL"
          git config credential.helper "store --file=.git/credentials"
          echo "https://${{ secrets.GH_TOKEN }}:@github.com" > .git/credentials
      - name: Install Asciidoctor

      - name: Install and generate docs
        run: |
          ./mvnw install -P docs -q -U -DskipTests=true -Dmaven.test.redirectTestOutputToFile=true
          ./docs/src/main/asciidoc/ghpages.sh

        if: github.event_name == 'push'

        run: ./mvnw clean install -nsu

input:
name: Java CI

on: [push, pull_request]

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        include:
          - GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS: '5.3,5.6'
            PUBLISH_SONAR: 'true'
          - GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS: '6.0,6.6'
    env:
      SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/modules-2/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-${{ matrix.GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS }}-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-

    - name: Prepull Docker images
      run: bash -c "docker pull alfresco/alfresco-content-repository-community:6.0.7-ga & docker pull tomcat:7-jre8 & docker pull hello-world & docker pull alpine:edge & wait"

    - name: Build
      run: |
        GRADLE_ARGS="check -i -PintegrationTestGradleVersions=$GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS"
        if [[ "$PUBLISH_SONAR" == "true" && -n "$SONAR_TOKEN" ]]; then
          GRADLE_ARGS="${GRADLE_ARGS} sonarqube -Dsonar.projectKey=xenit-eu_alfresco-docker-gradle-plugin -Dsonar.organization=xenit-eu -Dsonar.host.url=https://sonarcloud.io -Dsonar.login=$SONAR_TOKEN"
        fi
        ./gradlew $GRADLE_ARGS

    - name: Before cache
      if: always()
      run: rm -f $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock

  deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: startsWith(github.ref, 'refs/tags/')
    steps:
    - uses: actions/checkout@v4
      with:
        fetch-depth: 0

    - name: Cache Gradle
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: |
          ~/.gradle/caches/modules-2/
          ~/.gradle/wrapper/
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-deploy-${{ hashFiles('**/*.gradle*', '**/gradle-wrapper.properties') }}
        restore-keys: |
          ${{ runner.os }}-gradle-deploy-

    - name: Publish Gradle plugin
      env:
        GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY }}
        GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET: ${{ secrets.GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET }}
      run: ./gradlew publishPlugins -Pgradle.publish.key=$GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY -Pgradle.publish.secret=$GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET -x check
output:
language: java
git:
  depth: false

addons:
  apt:
    packages:
      - docker-ce
services:
  - docker

before_cache:
  - rm -f  $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/modules-2.lock

cache:
  directories:
    - $HOME/.gradle/caches/modules-2/
    - $HOME/.gradle/wrapper/

jobs:
  include:
    - stage: deploy
      script: skip
      deploy:
        provider: script
        skip_cleanup: true
        on:
          tags: true
        script: ./gradlew publishPlugins -Pgradle.publish.key=$GRADLE_PUBLISH_KEY -Pgradle.publish.secret=$GRADLE_PUBLISH_SECRET -x check

stages:
  - test
  - deploy

env:
  - GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS=5.3,5.6 PUBLISH_SONAR=true
  - GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS=6.0,6.6

before_script:
  - 'bash -c "docker pull alfresco/alfresco-content-repository-community:6.0.7-ga& docker pull tomcat:7-jre8& docker pull hello-world& docker pull alpine:edge&"'

script:
  - >
    GRADLE_ARGS="check -i -PintegrationTestGradleVersions=$GRADLE_INTEGRATION_TEST_VERSIONS";
    if [[ "$PUBLISH_SONAR" == "true" && "$TRAVIS_SECURE_ENV_VARS" == "true" ]]; then
      GRADLE_ARGS="${GRADLE_ARGS} sonarqube -Dsonar.projectKey=xenit-eu_alfresco-docker-gradle-plugin -Dsonar.organization=xenit-eu -Dsonar.host.url=https://sonarcloud.io -Dsonar.login=$SONAR_TOKEN"
    fi;
    ./gradlew $GRADLE_ARGS;
